description: Layered rule registry for GUI-managed company, agent, and project rules.

layers.name: system
layers.purpose: Non-negotiable autoload, routing, security, and knowledge governance.

layers.name: company_global
layers.purpose: Company-wide operating rules shared by all agents and projects.

layers.name: project
layers.purpose: Project-specific rules, constraints, client preferences, and delivery standards.

layers.name: agent
layers.purpose: Agent-specific behavior, role boundaries, and quality checks.

layers.name: task
layers.purpose: Current user request and temporary task constraints.
